channel.title: 波斯爵士电台 Persian Jazz Radio
channel.description: Persian jazz compilations — Qajar-era melodies meet modern jazz fusion. Curated from WeAreJazz & QajarJazz collections.
channel.itunes:author: Leo
channel.itunes:summary: Persian jazz compilations — Qajar-era melodies meet modern jazz fusion. Curated from WeAreJazz & QajarJazz collections.
